content: Phase 3: RBAC bug fix - Custom role permissions not working for PO/shipment creation
Phase 4: Accessories in material inspection + additional shipment requests with accessories
Phase 5: Vendor inspection PDF export (materials + accessories + PO info)
Phase 6: Product photos - upload in master data + display in downstream views
Phase 7: Dashboard UI/UX - modern analytics visualizations + date range filter
Phase 8: Serial Tracking - expandable serial list in ERP + vendor portal
Phase 9: Regression testing for all new features
